title: HyperGraphRAG: A Hypergraph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation Framework for Knowledge-intensive Applications

defines.name: HyperGraphRAG
defines.definition: A hypergraph-based RAG framework that represents and retrieves n-ary relational facts with hyperedges to improve knowledge-intensive generation.

problem: Existing graph-based RAG methods are limited to binary relations and cannot faithfully represent n-ary facts common in real-world knowledge, causing incomplete and less effective retrieval and generation.
